22.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

22.gl: properly, hidden, i.e. dark; used only of the north as aquarter (gloomy and unknown)
gold, figuratively, something gold-colored (i.e. yellow), as oil, a clear sky
22.dv: from an unused root meaning to shimmer;

22.gl: grandeur (i.e. an imposing form and appearance)
22.kj: beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty.

22.dv: rarely (shortened) אֱלֹהַּ; probably prolonged (emphatic) from H410 (אֵל);
or אָתָא; a primitive root (collateral to H225 (אוּת) contraction);

23.kj: [phrase] adversary, ceremony, charge, [idiom] crime, custom, desert, determination, discretion, disposing, due, fashion, form, to be judged, judgment, just(-ice, -ly), (manner of)

23.gl: to depress literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive (in various applications, as follows)

23.dv: a primitive root (possibly rather identical with H6030 (עָנָה) through the idea of looking down or browbeating);

23.gl: properly, to come forth to, i.e. appear or exist; transitively, to attain, i.e. find or acquire; figuratively, to occur, meet or be present
23.kj: [phrase] be able, befall, being, catch, [idiom] certainly, (cause to) come (on, to, to hand), deliver, be enough (cause to) find(-ing, occasion, out), get (hold upon), [idiom] have

23.gl: vigor, literally (force, in a good or a bad sense) or figuratively (capacity, means, produce); also (from its hardiness) a large lizard
23.kj: ability, able, chameleon, force, fruits, might, power(-ful), strength, substance, wealth.
23.dv: or (Daniel 11:6) כּוֹחַ; from an unused root meaning to be firm;

23.kj: abundance(-antly), all, [idiom] common (sort), excellent, great(-ly, -ness, number), huge, be increased, long, many, more in number, most, much, multitude, plenty(-ifully), [idiom]

23.gl: rightness (abstractly), subjectively (rectitude), objectively (justice), morally (virtue) or figuratively (prosperity)

24.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
24.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a

24.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
24.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
24.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

24.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
24.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

24.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
24.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).
